compiled_state.title: Collapse v2/v3 dual-path in classify-task.sh to v3-only ticket CLI
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## TDD Requirement

Depends on 2b8c-1729 (RED test task). Make the failing tests GREEN.

Tests to make GREEN:
- test_classify_task_no_use_v3_detection
- test_classify_task_no_TICKETS_DIR_branch
- test_classify_task_no_tk_ready
- test_classify_task_no_tk_show

## Implementation Steps

### classify-task.sh: Remove _use_v3 detection (lines 54-64)

Remove the _use_v3 detection block:
```bash
# REMOVE these lines:
_use_v3=false
if [ -n "${TICKETS_DIR:-}" ]; then
    _use_v3=false
elif [ -n "${TICKETS_TRACKER_DIR:-}" ]; then
    _use_v3=true
elif [ -d "$REPO_ROOT/.tickets-tracker" ]; then
    _use_v3=true
fi
```

### classify-task.sh: Collapse --from-epic branch to v3-only (lines 66-83)

Replace the dual-path while loop with v3-only ticket list + filter:
```bash
# Replace with:
TICKET_CMD="${TICKET_CMD:-$SCRIPT_DIR/ticket}"
while IFS= read -r tid; do
    [ -n "$tid" ] && task_ids+=("$tid")
done < <("$TICKET_CMD" list 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "
import json, sys
tickets = json.load(sys.stdin)
epic_id = sys.argv[1]
for t in tickets:
    if t.get('parent_id') == epic_id and t.get('status') in ('open', 'in_progress'):
        print(t['ticket_id'])
" "$epic_id" || true)
```

### classify-task.sh: Replace tk show (lines 93-98)

Replace:
`raw=$(tk show "$task_id" 2>/dev/null || echo "")`
With:
`raw=$("$TICKET_CMD" show "$task_id" 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print('type: '+d.get('ticket_type','')); print('# '+d.get('title',''))" 2>/dev/null || echo "")`

Note: The existing Python inline parser in classify-task.sh (lines 102-116) extracts from markdown format. The ticket show JSON output needs to be converted to the expected format, OR the Python parser updated to handle JSON directly. Prefer updating the parser to read JSON.

## Files Modified
- plugins/dso/scripts/classify-task.sh (Edit)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] ruff format --check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] No _use_v3 variable in classify-task.sh
  Verify: ! grep -q '_use_v3' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/classify-task.sh
- [ ] No .tickets/ path reference in classify-task.sh
  Verify: ! grep -q '\.tickets/' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/classify-task.sh
- [ ] No tk ready or tk show calls in classify-task.sh
  Verify: ! grep -qE 'tk ready|tk show' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/classify-task.sh
- [ ] RED tests from 2b8c-1729 now pass (GREEN)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-classify-task.sh
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: Tests written (RED tests exist from 2b8c-1729) ✓
